message: Node started: Design a greedy algorithm or a local search heuristic that selects stamp placements (m, i, j) to increase the total sum of the board. Consider that adding a stamp increases cell values modulo 998244353. A simple approach is to pick the stamp and position that provides the largest increase to the current sum without causing many cells to wrap around the modulo (which would decrease the sum). Provide the logic for selecting the next best placement iteratively up to K times.
